title: Why Reed Hastings' Netflix culture memo says working harder can quietly hurt your company
summary_full: Netflix's famed cultural memo champions results over mere effort, challenging traditional workplaces that reward busyness. It advocates for 'talent density' and autonomy, urging managers to assess tasks by their impact rather than time spent. This approach, though sometimes uncomfortable, remains relevant for boosting genuine productivity by focusing on tangible achievements.
